staticText: Use the Nigeria Land Use Charge route only as a Lagos State notice-driven planning calculator. Do not provide a Nigeria-wide rate and do not invent rates for Abuja, Kano, Rivers, Ogun, Oyo or another state. Under the Lagos State Land Use Charge Law 2020, the statutory structure is LUC = [(LA times LR) plus (BA times BR times DR)] times RR times CR. LA is land area, LR is the official neighbourhood land rate, BA is developed floor area, BR is the official construction value, DR is the depreciation factor, RR is the applicable relief factor and CR is the annual charge rate. The Annual Charge Rates Notice 2020 gives a permitted range of 0% to 3.5% but does not provide one universal property-use rate. Require the user to copy the assessed value or component values, current annual rate and any discount directly from the official assessment or demand notice. The current Lagos LUC portal mentions a 15% prompt-payment discount within 15 days, while the 2020 law says a discount may be specified on the demand notice and the portal still references the repealed 2001 law. Therefore do not prefill 15% or infer eligibility; accept only the discount printed on the current notice. Do not calculate exemptions, pensioner or disability status, penalties, arrears, receivership, appeal deadlines, title fees, Certificate of Occupancy fees or payment confirmation. No address, owner name, payer ID, property identifier or document is required. The official notice overrides the calculator.
